BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). - schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines.   <outcome>"{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\activity-log.ts\",\"oldString\":\"import type { Observation } from \\\"./tool-observer.js\\\";\",\"newString\":\"import { observationsPath, type Observation } from \\\"./tool-observer.js\\\";\",\"originalFile\":\"/**\\n * activity-log.ts — Unified Activity Log\\n *\\n * 提供統一讀取介面，把三個獨立 JSONL log（hit-log、event-log、tool-observer）\\n * 合併為單一時序活動流。不改各自的寫入邏輯（向後相容），只在讀取端統一。\\n *\\n * 用途：\\n * - /dream 產出每日活動摘要\\n * - 未來 instinct observer 分析\\n * - wiki 更新觸發判斷（Ingest Ripple 消費此流）\\n */\\n\\nimport { readFileSync, existsSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport path from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\nimport type { HitEntry } from \\\"./hit-log.js\\\";\\nimport type { StateEvent } from \\\"./event-log.js\\\";\\nimport type { Observation } from \\\"./tool-observer.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── 統一 Schema timestamp */\\n  ts: string;\\n  /** 來源 log 系統 */\\n  source: ActivitySource;\\n  /** 活動類別（hit type / event type / tool name） */\\n  category: string;\\n  /** 一行摘要（人類可讀） */\\n  summary: string;\\n  /** 原始資料（完整保留供消費者深入分析） */\\n  raw: HitEntry | StateEvent | Observation;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Log 路徑 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst HIT_LOG_PATH = \\\"observations.jsonl\\\");\\n\\n// ─── 解析器 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction parseHitEntries(since: string): ActivityEntry[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(HIT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n  const entries: ActivityEntry[] = [];\\n  try {\\n    const raw = readFileSync(HIT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    for (const line of raw.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")) {\\n      if (!line.trim()) continue;\\n      try {\\n        const e: HitEntry = JSON.parse(line);\\n        if (e.ts < since) continue;\\n        entries.push({\\n          ts: e.ts,\\n          source: \\\"hit\\\",\\n          category: e.type,\\n          summary: `${e.type} 命中: ${e.key} (from ${e.source})`,\\n          raw: e,\\n        });\\n      } catch { /* 跳過格式錯誤行 */ }\\n    }\\n  } [];\\n  try {\\n    const raw = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    for (const line of raw.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")) {\\n      if (!line.trim()) continue;\\n      try {\\n        const e: StateEvent = JSON.parse(line);\\n        if (e.ts < since) continue;\\n        const detail = summarizeEvent(e);\\n        entries.push({\\n          ts: e.ts,\\n          source: \\\"event\\\",\\n parseObservationEntries(since: string): ActivityEntry[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(OBSERVATIONS_PATH)) return [];\\n  const entries: ActivityEntry[] = [];\\n  try {\\n    const raw = readFileSync(OBSERVATIONS_PATH, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    for (const line of raw.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")) {\\n      if (!line.trim()) continue;\\n      try {\\n        const e: Observation = JSON.parse(line);\\n        if (e.ts < since) continue;\\n        const status = e.status ? ` [${e.status}]` : e.isError ? \\\" [error]\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n        entries.push({\\n          ts: e.ts,\\n          source: \\\"observation\\\",\\n          category: e.name,\\n          summary: `tool: ${e.name}${status}`,\\n          raw: e,\\n        });\\n      } catch { /* 跳過格式錯誤行 */ }\\n    }\\n  } catch { /* 檔案讀取失敗 */ }\\n  return entries;\\n}\\n\\nfunction summarizeEvent(e: StateEvent): string {\\n  const p = e.payload;\\n  switch (e.type) {\\n    case \\\"session_start\\\": return `session 開始${p.sessionId ? ` (${String(p.sessionId).slice(0, 8)})` : \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"session_end\\\": return `session 結束${p.reason ? `: ${p.reason}` : \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"goal_start\\\": return `goal 啟動: ${p.objective ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"goal_done\\\": return `goal 完成: ${p.reason ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"goal_cancel\\\": return `goal 取消`;\\n    case \\\"specialist_spawn\\\": return `specialist 啟動: ${p.name ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"specialist_done\\\": return `specialist 完成: ${p.name ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"scheduler_fire\\\": return `排程觸發: ${p.prompt ?? p.id ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"tool_call\\\": return `tool call: ${p.name ?? \\\"\\\"}${p.status === \\\"failed\\\" ? \\\" [failed]\\\" : \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    case \\\"error\\\": return `錯誤: ${p.message ?? p.error ?? \\\"\\\"}`;\\n    default: return `${e.type}`;\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── 公開 API ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ActivityQueryOptions {\\n  /** 起始時間（ISO string），預設 24 小時前 */\\n  since?: string;\\n  /** 過濾來源 */\\n  sources?: ActivitySource[];\\n  /** 過濾類別（支援前綴匹配） */\\n  categories?: string[];\\n  /** 最多回傳筆數 */\\n  limit?: number;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 查詢統一活動流。合併三個 log 並依時序排序。\\n */\\nexport function queryActivity(opts: ActivityQueryOptions = {}): ActivityEntry[] {\\n  const since = opts.since ?? new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\\n  const sources = opts.sources ?? [\\\"hit\\\", \\\"event\\\", \\\"observation\\\"];\\n  const limit = opts.limit ?? 500;\\n\\n  let entries: ActivityEntry[] = [];\\n\\n  if (sources.includes(\\\"hit\\\")) entries.push(...parseHitEntries(since));\\n  if (sources.includes(\\\"event\\\")) entries.push(...parseEventEntries(since));\\n  if (sources.includes(\\\"observation\\\")) entries.push(...parseObservationEntries(since));\\n\\n  // 類別過濾\\n  if (opts.categories?.length) {\\n    entries = entries.filter((e) =>\\n      opts.categories!.some((c) => e.category.startsWith(c))\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  // 依時序排序（新→舊）\\n  entries.sort((a, b) => b.ts.localeCompare(a.ts));\\n\\n  return entries.slice(0, limit);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 取得活動摘要統計（用於 /dream 報告或 Ingest Ripple 判斷）。\\n */\\nexport function getActivitySummary(hours = 24): {\\n  total: number;\\n  bySource: Record<ActivitySource, number>;\\n  topCategories: Array<{ category: string; count: number }>;\\n  factHits: number;\\n  wikiHits: number;\\n} {\\n  const since = new Date(Date.now() - hours * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\\n  const entries = queryActivity({ since });\\n\\n  const bySource: Record<ActivitySource, number> = { hit: 0, event: 0, observation: 0 };\\n  const catMap = new Map<string, number>();\\n  let factHits = 0;\\n  let wikiHits = 0;\\n\\n  for (const e of entries) {\\n    bySource[e.source]++;\\n    catMap.set(e.category, (catMap.get(e.category) ?? 0) + 1);\\n    if (e.source === \\\"hit\\\") {\\n      const hitRaw = e.raw as HitEntry;\\n      if (hitRaw.type === \\\"fact\\\") factHits++;\\n      if (hitRaw.type === \\\"wiki\\\") wikiHits++;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  const topCategories = [...catMap.entries()]\\n    .map(([category, count]) => ({ category, count }))\\n    .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)\\n    .slice(0, 10);\\n\\n  return { total: entries.length, bySource, topCategories, factHits, wikiHits };\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":15,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":15,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" import { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\",\" import type { HitEntry } from \\\"./hit-log.js\\\";\",\" import type { StateEvent } from \\\"./event-log.js\\\";\",\"-import type { Observation } from \\\"./tool-observer.js\\\";\",\"+import { observationsPath, type Observation } from \\\"./tool-observer.js\\\";\",\" \",\" // ─── 統一 Schema ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\",\" \"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

- `activity-log.ts` (read side) hardcoded the path
